title: Sunrise & Sunset Audio
description: This mod adds Rooster Crow and Wolf Howl when sun is rising or sitting into Minecraft. Just like in The Legend of Zelda...
body:
# Sunrise & Sunset Audio Mod

This is simple mod, that adds rooster crowing sound at the mornig and evening wolf howling sound to the game. There is a bunch of options like volume control, or you even can turn on The Cave mod, which means, that the sounds will not play underground, also you can trun on text messages. Default options key is "numpad 0" which is also configurable in options menu. Enjoy The legend of Zelda fans!
 

---

**THIS MOD ONLY FOR CLIENT-SIDE, DO NOT INSTALL IT ON SERVER.. IT WILL CRASH**

---

But it works fine in local singleplayer server.
